step_rationale: G-protein-coupled receptor activated by trypsin; drives leukocyte recruitment and pro-inflammatory signaling.
mechanism: PAR-2 activation by trypsin amplifies vascular inflammation and monocyte/macrophage infiltration destabilizing the atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: Expression of ectopic trypsin in atherosclerotic plaques and the effects of aprotinin on plaque stability.
